raw_response: analysisWe need pick one player to vote. Based on discussion, Justin claims he was Seer, saw two normal cards. Mitchell claims he was Robber, stole from Paul, saw Insomniac. Paul claims Insomniac. There's confusion. Likely someone lying. Probably Mitchell is lying about being robber; maybe he's the werewolf. Justin says Mitchell is tanner? But Tanner would want to die. They didn't die. So Tanner likely not. Maybe Paul is lying. I'd vote Paul as suspect because he claims Insomniac but others doubt. Justin seems consistent. So vote Paul.assistantfinal{"chosen_vote":"Paul","justification":"Justin’s statements are internally consistent—he claims to have been the Seer and saw two non‑werewolf cards, and he does not accuse anyone else of lying. Mitchell’s story is contradictory (claiming to be the Robber, stealing from Paul, yet also claiming to have seen an Insomniac), and Paul’s claim of being the Insomniac is doubted by both Justin and Mitchell. Given the confusion and the fact that Paul is the only one whose narrative is questioned, voting Paul maximizes the chance of eliminating a potential Werewolf or liar."}
